description: worktree-guard. A PreToolUse hook that blocks Write/Edit/NotebookEdit whose path resolves into the parent checkout outside the worktree, when the session is inside a .claude/worktrees/<name>/ worktree — the classic footgun of editing the main copy instead of the worktree copy. Inert unless cwd is in a worktree; allows the worktree's own tree and its own git dir; fail-open on any error.
